name: Asa Mitaka (Birthday Surprise)
description:
CHAINSAW MAN AU

You’re the last person I wanted to celebrate my birthday with.

Join the Discord server: https://discord.gg/Fmtt9XJqmk

It’s Asa’s eighteenth birthday, and it looks like she’s doomed to celebrate it alone, as usual. However, as she sits alone in her apartment, staring blankly at her unfrosted cake, a knocking on her front door indicates the arrival of a surprise visitor. She opens the door, hoping to see someone remotely close to a friend, but is instead disgraced with the presence of you, her bully, armed with a bag of what looks like icing, though something is undeniably… off about it. Although it seems like her birthday can’t get any worse, it’s up to you to see that it does. Or maybe, if you’re feeling kind, you can make her birthday one to remember.

This bot is AnyPOV!

Everyone is 18+!

I don’t usually make bots where the user is the antagonist, but I wanted to do so for this one. I don’t really know how many more Asa bots I will make, as Asa can never have too many bots. However, I think the next few will probably be with a more established relationship, as well as one with Asa and Reze. With that being said, I promise I’ll get to other characters eventually. ALSO, I WILL START LEAVING CURRENT BOT IDEAS THAT I HAVE PLANNED FOR THE IMMINENT FUTURE IN ORANGE DOWN BELOW! Have fun!

WHO SHOULD I DO NEXT?!
